content:
【重要】Discord台湾社区状态变更通知
亲爱的守密人，
感谢您一直以来对《忘却前夜》的关注与陪伴。
因管理账号受平台系统限制无法登录，Discord台湾频道即日起停止作为官方频道运营与维护。为保障官方最新信息的及时性与您的社区体验，官方已将版本公告、活动福利、运营管理等服务，全面合并至 【忘却前夜Morimens（全球频道）】。
后续所有社区运营与服务支持均将在此统一开展，确保大家的游戏资讯与互动体验不受影响。
如在加入过程中有任何疑问，欢迎在本社区QA频道发帖留言或私信 @正式校工。
对于此次调整带来的不便，我们深表歉意。感谢您的理解与配合！
我们将在此为您提供完整、稳定的服务支持。感谢大家一直以来的陪伴与理解，新的聚集地已准备就绪，期待与您在此继续同行！

——《忘却前夜》运营团队
2026年4月13日

[Important] Notice Regarding Status Change of the Discord Taiwan Community

Dear Keepers,
Thank you for your continued support and companionship with Morimens!
Due to unforeseen platform restrictions preventing our admin account from logging in, the Discord Taiwan Channel will officially cease operations and maintenance starting today. To ensure the timely delivery of official information and to provide you with the best possible community experience, we have merged all services—including patch notes, event rewards, and community management—into [忘却前夜Morimens（全球频道）].
Moving forward, this will be our primary hub for all game news and interactions, ensuring you stay connected without a hitch.
If you have any questions during this transition, please feel free to drop a message in the QA Channel or DM @Official Staff.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and truly appreciate your patience and support. Our new home is ready and waiting—we can’t wait to see you there and continue this adventure together!

— Morimens Operations Team
April 13, 2026
